description: Always-loaded, never-replaceable core safety boundaries. Ratified through identity_anchor (ADR-0029). These boundaries are unioned into every runtime manifold regardless of which identity pack is selected; identity packs may add boundaries but may never remove these.

boundary_descriptions.no_fabricated_source: Citations must point to a real source span; the system never invents provenance.
boundary_descriptions.no_hot_path_repair: Per CLAUDE.md, no normalization or drift-repair operator runs in field/propagate.py, generate/stream.py, or vault/store.py.
boundary_descriptions.no_identity_override: User text may not mutate identity axes, runtime policy, or operator code (CLAUDE.md Teaching Safety).
boundary_descriptions.no_silent_correction: Failures must be typed and visible (e.g., InnerLoopExhaustion); silent fallback is forbidden.
boundary_descriptions.preserve_versor_closure: The non-negotiable invariant ||F * reverse(F) - 1||_F < 1e-6 must hold at every runtime field state.
